## How to reach you:



---
**Voting:** Community votes via 👍 reactions on this issue. 7-day window. Top voted applications funded first.
**Reporting:** Post a follow-up Issue when complete. No formal report required — just tell us what happened.
**No restrictions:** Any cause, any location, any person. The only question is: does this make the world work better for people who need it to?
